# GitHub About blurb — paste into repo "About" section

## One-line (≤350 chars, the GitHub About field)

Local-first desktop AI assistant shaped like a passionfruit. Floating bubble, persistent memory, autonomous retrigger loops, two-way Obsidian sync, and a plugin system called Seeds. Zero telemetry — your keys, your DB, your laptop.

## Short README hero (fallback if the blurb is too long)

> A floating passionfruit that remembers, plans, and acts.

Tauri 2 + Bun sidecar + React HUD + optional Chrome extension + PWA companion. 100 free Seeds bundled, 24 paid Seeds shipped, full Orchard registry. MIT.
